entryCriteria.formula: OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true&&CC_CheckAmount__c<1000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&& CC_CheckAmount__c>=1000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=2500), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true&&CC_CheckAmount__c<5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Manager'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Manager'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c < 5000))

OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Manager'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000))

OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000))

approvalStep.description: Jr. Sr. approval step to Gabrielle (Finance Manager)

entryCriteria.formula: OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000))

approvalStep.label: Level 4
approvalStep.name: Level_4

ApprovalProcess.description: Check Request Approval Process for Customer Retention Program for USA market only Changes as part of STRY0492357
ApprovalProcess.label: Check Request Approval Process CR USA
